case_title: TARA NOEL SULLIVAN VS. TYLER DECKLIN LENANE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
